tool_calls.input:
{"code":"(def repo-counts (frequencies (map :repo open-prs)))
(def max-repo (apply max-key val repo-counts))
(def result {:total-open-prs pr-count
             :repository-with-most-open-prs (key max-repo)
             :count-for-that-repo (val max-repo)
             :all-repo-counts repo-counts})
result"}
